title: astragalus caspicus subsp. pseudocaspius
intro: Astragalus caspicus subsp. pseudocaspius is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, native to Central Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus caspicus subsp. pseudocaspius include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus caspicus subsp. pseudocaspius can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
